description: Create a Talon Python module and companion .talon command file in C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\Talon\user\network_grapher\ to query a SQLite database of criminal intercepts (C:\Users\Docker\Documents\caviar.db) for visual link analysis. The database contains a 'communications' table with 'source', 'target', and 'weight' columns. In grapher.py, implement the action user.insert_associates(suspect: str) to insert a comma-separated string of all distinct people who communicated with the suspect, and the action user.graph_network(suspect: str) to generate a Graphviz DOT directed graph of all communication records involving the suspect, saved to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\suspect_network.dot. In grapher.talon, define voice commands 'list associates <user.text>' and 'graph network <user.text>' to trigger these actions.
